bug_description: rate_limit_mw.py raises exception instead of returning error response, which bypasses logging_mw.py's after-hook
root_cause: rate_limit_mw.py process() raises RateLimitExceeded exception instead of return Response(status_code=429)
symptom: logs are incomplete when rate-limited - logging_after is missing from log
fix_location: src/rate_limit_mw.py process() - replace 'raise RateLimitExceeded' with 'return Response(status_code=429)'
verification: check.sh returns 1 when run, confirming tests fail due to exception bypassing after-hook
